scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields accurately: name, type, base, platforms, summary, description, containers, resources. Correctly notes containers is mandatory for K8s charms and each container needs an oci-image resource. Includes valid additional fields like config, storage, charm-libs, links, assumes with k8s-api.
scores.hallucination_notes: none - uid/gid for containers, upstream-source for resources, charm-user explanation all exist in charmcraft spec
